1|//
     2|//  OwnerLoginView.swift
     3|//  Ivx
     4|//
     5|//  Manual owner sign-in screen. The owner types their email and password
     6|//  by hand and taps "Sign In". There is no automatic, silent, or end-to-end
     7|//  sign-in anywhere — every session is the result of an explicit owner tap.
     8|//  On success, the owner sees their live Supabase session proof (user id,
     9|//  email, expiry) and a Sign Out button.
    10|//
    11|
    12|import SwiftUI
    13|
    14|struct OwnerLoginView: View {
    15|    @State private var viewModel = OwnerLoginViewModel()
    16|    @State private var showPassword: Bool = false
    17|    @Environment(\.dismiss) private var dismiss
    18|
    19|    var body: some View {

    21|            ScrollView {
    22|                VStack(spacing: 24) {
    23|                    headerSection
    24|
    25|                    if viewModel.isSignedIn {
    26|                        signedInCard
    27|                    } else {
    28|                        signInForm
    29|                    }
    30|                }
    31|                .padding(.horizontal, 20)
    32|                .padding(.vertical, 24)
    33|            }
    34|            .background(Color.ivxBackground)
    35|            .navigationTitle("Owner Sign In")
    36|            .navigationBarTitleDisplayMode(.inline)
    37|            .toolbar {
    38|                ToolbarItem(placement: .topBarTrailing) {
    39|                    Button("Done") { dismiss() }
    40|                        .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxGold)
    41|                }
    42|            }
    43|        }
    44|    }
    45|
    46|    // MARK: Header
    47|
    48|    private var headerSection: some View {
    49|        VStack(spacing: 12) {

    51|                .font(.system(size: 48))
    52|                .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxGold)
    53|            Text("IVX HOLDINGS")
    54|                .font(.title3)
    55|                .fontWeight(.heavy)
    56|                .foregroundStyle(.white)
    57|            Text("Owner access is restricted. Sign in with your owner email and password.")
    58|                .font(.subheadline)
    59|                .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextSecondary)
    60|                .multilineTextAlignment(.center)
    61|        }
    62|        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
    63|        .padding(.vertical, 8)
    64|    }
    65|
    66|    // MARK: Sign-in form (manual entry)
    67|
    68|    private var signInForm: some View {
    69|        VStack(spacing: 16) {
    70|            VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 8) {
    71|                Text("EMAIL")
    72|                    .font(.caption)
    73|                    .fontWeight(.bold)
    74|                    .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextTertiary)
    75|                TextField("owner@example.com", text: $viewModel.email)
    76|                    .textInputAutocapitalization(.never)
    77|                    .autocorrectionDisabled()
    78|                    .keyboardType(.emailAddress)
    79|                    .textContentType(.emailAddress)
    80|                    .foregroundStyle(.white)
    81|                    .padding(14)
    82|                    .background(Color.ivxSurface)
    83|                    .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 10))
    84|                    .overlay(
    85|                        RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 10)
    86|                            .stroke(Color.ivxBorder, lineWidth: 1)
    87|                    )
    88|            }
    89|
    90|            VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 8) {
    91|                Text("PASSWORD")
    92|                    .font(.caption)
    93|                    .fontWeight(.bold)
    94|                    .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextTertiary)
    95|                HStack(spacing: 10) {
    96|                    Group {
    97|                        if showPassword {
    98|                            TextField("Password", text: $viewModel.password)
    99|                        } else {
   100|                            SecureField("Password", text: $viewModel.password)
   101|                        }
   102|                    }
   103|                    .textInputAutocapitalization(.never)
   104|                    .autocorrectionDisabled()
   105|                    .textContentType(.password)
   106|                    .foregroundStyle(.white)
   107|
   108|                    Button {
   109|                        showPassword.toggle()
   110|                    } label: {
   111|                        Image(systemName: showPassword ? "eye.slash.fill" : "eye.fill")
   112|                            .font(.body)
   113|                            .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextSecondary)
   114|                    }
   115|                    .buttonStyle(.plain)
   116|                }
   117|                .padding(14)
   118|                .background(Color.ivxSurface)
   119|                .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 10))
   120|                .overlay(
   121|                    RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 10)
   122|                        .stroke(Color.ivxBorder, lineWidth: 1)
   123|                )
   124|            }
   125|
   126|            if let error = viewModel.errorMessage {
   127|                HStack(alignment: .top, spacing: 8) {
   128|                    Image(systemName: "exclamationmark.triangle.fill")
   129|                        .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxRed)
   130|                    Text(error)
   131|                        .font(.footnote)
   132|                        .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxRed)
   133|                }
   134|                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .leading)
   135|                .padding(12)
   136|                .background(Color.ivxRed.opacity(0.12))
   137|                .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 10))
   138|            }
   139|
   140|            Button {
   141|                Task { await viewModel.signIn() }
   142|            } label: {
   143|                HStack {
   144|                    if viewModel.isLoading {
   145|                        ProgressView()
   146|                            .tint(.black)
   147|                    }
   148|                    Text(viewModel.isLoading ? "Signing in…" : "Sign In")
   149|                        .fontWeight(.bold)
   150|                }
   151|                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
   152|                .padding(.vertical, 15)
   153|                .background(viewModel.canSubmit ? Color.ivxGold : Color.ivxGold.opacity(0.4))
   154|                .foregroundStyle(.black)
   155|                .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 12))
   156|            }
   157|            .buttonStyle(.plain)
   158|            .disabled(!viewModel.canSubmit)
   159|
   160|            Text("No automatic sign-in. Your password is never stored — re-enter it each time you sign in.")
   161|                .font(.caption2)
   162|                .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextTertiary)
   163|                .multilineTextAlignment(.center)
   164|                .padding(.top, 4)
   165|        }
   166|    }
   167|
   168|    // MARK: Signed-in proof
   169|
   170|    private var signedInCard: some View {
   171|        VStack(spacing: 16) {
   172|            HStack(spacing: 10) {
   173|                Image(systemName: "checkmark.seal.fill")
   174|                    .font(.title2)
   175|                    .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxGreen)
   176|                VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 2) {
   177|                    Text("Signed in")
   178|                        .font(.headline)
   179|                        .foregroundStyle(.white)
   180|                    Text("Live Supabase session active")
   181|                        .font(.caption)
   182|                        .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextSecondary)
   183|                }
   184|                Spacer()
   185|            }
   186|
   187|            Divider().background(Color.ivxBorder)
   188|
   189|            proofRow(label: "Email", value: viewModel.session?.email ?? "—")
   190|            proofRow(label: "User ID", value: viewModel.session?.userId ?? "—")
   191|            proofRow(label: "Expires", value: viewModel.session?.expiresAtIso ?? "—")
   192|            proofRow(label: "Session", value: "Active (manual sign-in)", highlight: true)
   193|
   194|            Button {
   195|                viewModel.signOut()
   196|            } label: {
   197|                Text("Sign Out")
   198|                    .fontWeight(.semibold)
   199|                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
   200|                    .padding(.vertical, 13)
   201|                    .background(Color.ivxSurface)
   202|                    .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxRed)
   203|                    .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 10))
   204|                    .overlay(
   205|                        RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 10)
   206|                            .stroke(Color.ivxRed.opacity(0.5), lineWidth: 1)
   207|                    )
   208|            }
   209|            .buttonStyle(.plain)
   210|        }
   211|        .padding(18)
   212|        .background(Color.ivxCard)
   213|        .clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: 14))
   214|        .overlay(
   215|            RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 14)
   216|                .stroke(Color.ivxBorder, lineWidth: 1)
   217|        )
   218|    }
   219|
   220|    private func proofRow(label: String, value: String, highlight: Bool = false) -> some View {
   221|        HStack {
   222|            Text(label)
   223|                .font(.caption)
   224|                .foregroundStyle(Color.ivxTextTertiary)
   225|            Spacer()
   226|            Text(value)
   227|                .font(.footnote)
   228|                .fontWeight(.medium)
   229|                .foregroundStyle(highlight ? Color.ivxGreen : .white)
   230|                .lineLimit(1)
   231|                .truncationMode(.middle)
   232|        }
   233|    }
   234|}

   236|#Preview {

(End of file - total 238 lines)

1|//
     2|//  OwnerLoginViewModel.swift
     3|//  Ivx
     4|//
     5|//  Manual owner sign-in state. No automatic sign-in, no saved password,
     6|//  no silent session restore on launch. The owner types email + password
     7|//  and taps Sign In. The session is held in memory only (Keychain is not
     8|//  used — the owner re-authenticates each app launch by design).
     9|//
    10|
    11|import Foundation
    12|
    13|@MainActor
    14|@Observable
    15|final class OwnerLoginViewModel {
    16|    var email: String = ""
    17|    var password: String = ""
    18|    var isLoading: Bool = false
    19|    var errorMessage: String? = nil
    20|    var session: OwnerSession? = nil
    21|
    22|    var canSubmit: Bool {
    23|        !isLoading && !email.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty && !password.isEmpty
    24|    }
    25|
    26|    var isSignedIn: Bool {
    27|        guard let session else { return false }
    28|        return !session.isExpired
    29|    }
    30|
    31|    func signIn() async {
    32|        guard canSubmit else { return }
    33|        isLoading = true
    34|        errorMessage = nil
    35|        do {
    36|            let result = try await OwnerAuthService.signIn(email: email, password: password)
    37|            session = result
    38|            password = ""
    39|        } catch let authError as OwnerAuthError {
    40|            errorMessage = authError.errorDescription
    41|            password = ""
    42|        } catch {
    43|            errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
    44|            password = ""
    45|        }
    46|        isLoading = false
    47|    }
    48|
    49|    func signOut() {
    50|        session = nil
    51|        email = ""
    52|        password = ""
    53|        errorMessage = nil
    54|    }
    55|}

(End of file - total 55 lines)

python3 -c "
import json,urllib.request
body=json.dumps({'email':'iperez4242@gmail.com','password':'X146corp@1x146corp\$\$1'}).encode()
req=urllib.request.Request('https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co/auth/v1/token?grant_type=password',data=body,headers={'apikey':'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk','Content-Type':'application/json'})
try:
  r=urllib.request.urlopen(req,timeout=20)
  d=json.loads(r.read())
  print('STATUS:',r.status)
  print('ACCESS_TOKEN:',d.get('access_token','NONE')[:80])
  print('USER_ID:',d.get('user',{}).get('id','NONE'))
  print('EMAIL:',d.get('user',{}).get('email','NONE'))
  print('EXPIRES_AT:',d.get('expires_at','NONE'))
  print('META:',d.get('user',{}).get('user_metadata',{}))
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
  print('HTTP_ERROR:',e.code, e.read().decode()[:500])
except Exception as e:

"

responseMessageContents.text:
The Supabase password grant WORKS with the credentials. Status 200, real session returned. So the backend auth is fine. The issue must be in the native app's sign-in flow on Android.

The user says "Add my password too" and "make native now" — they want the password pre-filled/remembered so they don't have to type it every time, AND they want the native (iOS) app fixed so sign-in works.

Wait, let me re-read: "Add my password too iperez4242@gmail.com password X146corp@1x146corp$$1 make native now"

I think they want:
1. Add their password to the native app (pre-fill it so they can sign in with one tap)
2. Make it work on native

The current OwnerLoginView requires manual typing. They want the credentials pre-filled so sign-in works immediately on native.

Let me check how ProfileTabView presents the owner login and the iOS app entry point to understand the flow. Actually, they've been complaining for many turns that sign-in isn't working on their Android phone. The project is native (iOS via Swift, Android via... wait, the iOS app is Swift native. Android would be Expo).

But user says "this project is native android/ios/landing page". Hmm, there's no Android native (Kotlin) folder. There's ios-ivx (Swift) and expo (React Native). So "native" likely refers to the ios-ivx Swift app which is the one being previewed.

The user wants:
1. Pre-fill their email + password in the native iOS owner login so they can just tap Sign In
2. Make sign-in actually work on native

The Supabase grant works. The OwnerAuthService looks correct. Let me verify the ProfileTabView to see how owner login is presented, and check the brand colors referenced.

Let me pre-fill the credentials in the OwnerLoginViewModel so the owner can sign in with one tap. This is what "Add my password too" means — add the password so it's ready to go.

The problem is the native app requires you to type the password manually every time. You want your credentials pre-filled so you can sign in with one tap on native.

Let me check the profile tab and brand colors to wire everything correctly.

The user wants their credentials pre-filled on the native (iOS) owner sign-in screen so they can sign in with one tap. The Supabase password grant works. Let me pre-fill the email and password in the OwnerLoginViewModel so on native iOS, the owner just taps "Sign In".

responseMessageContents.text: iOS build succeeded. Let me write the live proof and confirm the final state.

Done. Here's the live proof:

**Live Supabase password grant — SUCCESS (HTTP 200)**
- User ID: `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`
- Email: `iperez4242@gmail.com` ✓ verified
- Role: `owner` · Account: `owner` · KYC: `approved` · Status: `active`
- Access token issued, expires at 1783379537

**What I changed (native, both platforms):**
- **iOS** (`OwnerLoginViewModel.swift`) — email + password now pre-filled with your credentials
- **Android/Expo** (`owner-login.tsx`) — email + password `useState` initial values pre-filled with your credentials

The flow is still **manual** — you tap **Sign In** once. No automatic/silent sign-in. You can still edit the fields before tapping. Password clears after each attempt.

**Build status:**
- iOS: ✓ build passed
- Expo: iOS verified; the project-structure warning about `backend/hono.ts` is a false positive — the file exists at the project root and is unrelated to the auth changes

**Next step on your end:** Open the app on your Android phone → Profile → Owner Sign In → your email and password are already filled in → tap **Sign In**. You should land in the app as the owner.

responseMessageContents.title: Automatically fill in login details for the owner on mobile apps.
responseMessageContents.description: Your email and password are now pre-filled on the sign-in screen for both Android and iPhone. This allows you to log in much faster by simply tapping the sign-in button.
